{{Quote|Consulted the holocron of Jedi Tharence Wo again, I did. A fourth world he mentions.|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]]|<ref name="Jedi Council: Acts of War 4">[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 4|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 4]]</ref>}}
'''Tharence Wo's holocron''', also known as the '''Journals of Tharence Wo''', was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] created by [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tharence Wo]] upon which he recorded his journals. He used the [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] to record what he had learned about the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]], such as their immunity to the effects of [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Mind trick/Legends|persuasion]]. After the Yinchorri murdered Jedi [[Naeshahn]] and [[Ebor Taulk]], the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] rediscovered the journal's secrets.

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 4|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 4]] {{Mo}}
